    Methods in org.jline.utils with parameters of type ColorPalette
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    AttributedCharSequence.toAnsi(int colors, AttributedCharSequence.ForceMode force, ColorPalette palette)
    Converts this attributed string to an ANSI escape sequence string with the specified color capabilities, force mode, and color palette.
    String
    AttributedCharSequence.toAnsi(int colors, AttributedCharSequence.ForceMode force, ColorPalette palette, String altIn, String altOut)
    Converts this attributed string to an ANSI escape sequence string with the specified color capabilities, force mode, color palette, and alternate character set sequences.
